name: OSIB: Official Plugins
author: The OSIB team
description: The official default entities and transforms created by the OSINTBuddy team.

entities.label: Airport
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent an airport (IATA/ICAO codes and name).

entities.label: Bad Guy
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a suspect or hostile individual.

entities.label: Breach Data
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Reference breached data sources or upload small snippets.

entities.label: Business Leader
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent an executive or business leader.

entities.label: Certificate Transparency
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a CT log entry or lookup.

entities.label: Church
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a church or religious building.

entities.label: Company
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a company or organization entry.

entities.label: Conversation Email
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent an email thread or subject.

entities.label: DNS
entities.author: OSIB, Bugfest
entities.description: The Domain Name System translates domains into IPs

entities.label: DOI
entities.author: Unknown
entities.description: A a digital identifier of an object, any object; physical, digital, or abstract. DOIs solve a common problem: keeping track of things.

entities.label: Email Address
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent and store an email address.

entities.label: Explosive
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent an explosive material or device.

entities.label: Favicon Hash
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent an HTTP favicon hash (e.g., for Shodan/Censys).

entities.label: File
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Attach a generic file and metadata.

entities.label: Gang
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a gang or criminal group.

entities.label: Good Guy
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent an ally or friendly individual.

entities.label: Google Search
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Search google using the advanced operators you're used to

entities.label: Harbor
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a harbor or port location.

entities.label: HTTP Headers
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent HTTP response headers for a URL.

entities.label: Incident
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a security or criminal incident.

entities.label: Malware Sample
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Store a malware sample (handle with care).

entities.label: Meeting Social
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a social meeting or gathering.

entities.label: Metadata EXIF
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Attach an image and record parsed EXIF fields.

entities.label: Online Group
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent an online group or community.

entities.label: PDF Uploads
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Upload a PDF document for analysis or reference.

entities.label: PGP Key
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a PGP public key reference.

entities.label: Phone Number
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent and store a phone number (E.164).

entities.label: Ports
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a service port and protocol.

entities.label: Prison
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a prison or detention facility.

entities.label: robots.txt
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a robots.txt reference for a domain.

entities.label: Shodan
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a Shodan query or result reference.

entities.label: Shop
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a shop or retail location.

entities.label: SSL Certificate
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent details from an SSL/TLS certificate.

entities.label: Subdomain
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: A domain that is a part of another domain

entities.label: Transport
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represent a transport item or reference.

entities.label: URL
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Uniform Resource Locator, usually starts with https://

entities.label: Website
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: Represents a domain from a website on the internet

entities.label: Whois
entities.author: OSIB
entities.description: whois.com allows you to trace the ownership and tenure of a domain name or an IP address
